items.name: Shibuya Gudetama Cream Roll Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This Omiyage features Gudetama from Shibuya and contains delicious cream cake rolls. Contains 12 pieces.

items.name: Hello Kitty X Hachiko Cookies Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This Shibuya-limited Omiyage features Hello Kitty and Hachiko, which is the mascot for Shibuya. This contains 12 pieces of cookies.

items.name: Hello Kitty Miso Soup Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This Omiyage contains miso soup packs featuring Hello Kitty. Contains 12 packs.

items.name: Shimichoco Matcha Milk
items.merchantDescription: Shimichoco, a fan favorite snack, now in a new limited flavor! These star-shaped cookies are made with Uji matcha and white chocolate, a popular bittersweet flavor combo in Japan.

items.name: Aobe Gum
items.merchantDescription: This is no ordinary gum! Chew on the soda flavor for a while and stick out your tongue. What's new? Or was your tongue always like that?

items.name: Kajiriccho Grape & Soda
items.merchantDescription: Why have one flavor when you can have two? This candy is double-layered with grape on the outside and soda on the inside!

items.name: Mikan Mochi
items.merchantDescription: Kick it old-school with this classic sweet! It's mikan mochi, also known as tangerine, mochi candy

items.name: King's Melon Bread
items.merchantDescription: Melon bread is just about everywhere in Japan! Now it's your turn to try it with these melon bread cookies. They're sweet and crunchy with chocolate cream filling.

items.name: Warugaki Beer Candy DIY
items.merchantDescription: Beer for children! Yes, you read that correctly. Make your own glass of ice cold beer with this "Bad Kids Beer" DIY. Don't worry, it's no actually beer but it sure does look like it. 1. Pour the powder into a cup. 2. Add cold water. 3. Stir up the mixture.

items.name: Donguri Apple Candy
items.merchantDescription: Sweet green apple flavored hard candy. Get to the center to uncover the chewing gum hiding inside!

items.name: Buntan Candy
items.merchantDescription: A traditional candy started in the 1970's, it is buntan flavor, a citrus also known as pomelo, which has a sweet and sour flavor. Each chewy piece is wrapped in rice paper that will melt in your mouth!

items.name: Mini Bottle Candy
items.merchantDescription: Pop open one of these mini bottles to sip on the powder flavored candy! Receive one of three flavors: cider, strawberry, lemon.

items.name: Ginza Rusk Brown Chocolate
items.merchantDescription: Chocolate on chocolate! These dense chocolate rusks (crispy, sweet pieces of dried toast) are baked with rich chocolate and coated with cocoa powder to seriously curb your chocolate craving. Please Note: If temperatures in your location are above 28°C (82°F),

items.name: Fruits Jelly Beans
items.merchantDescription: Give me fruits! Strawberry, orange, grape...Just to name a few of the assorted fruit flavors of these colorful and chewy jelly beans.

items.name: Purumochi Grape Gummy
items.merchantDescription: These grape gummies are squishy like mochi! They also use Japanese grape juice as a recipe for the strong and tasty flavor.

items.name: Fruit Gummy Can
items.merchantDescription: Mikan slices in a can just like you can buy in the Japanese supermarket except they're even better because these are cute slices of chewy and juicy mikan gummy.

items.name: Furukawa Grape Gum
items.merchantDescription: Each piece of this original gum looks like a little grape. Tastes like one too!

items.name: Pukupukutai Mint Flavor
items.merchantDescription: Stay cool with this refreshing taiyaki! It's airy mint flavor is perfect for summer.

items.name: Afternoon Tea: Cheese Milk Flavor
items.merchantDescription: Cheese tea is very trendy in Japan! Afternoon Tea made their own cheese milk tea tasting like mascarpone. Each exclusive bottle design pays tribute to the youths of the Hesei era.

items.name: Shiso Furikake
items.merchantDescription: Brighten up your rice in flavor and color! This furikake is made from 100% Japanese red shiso and packs a refreshing herby taste. Sprinkle it on cold or warm rice for a tasty twist on your bento. Try it with: pickled plum, rice, mixed vegetable Directions: 1.

items.name: Hakata Animal Free Ramen
items.merchantDescription: Hakata is an area in Japan famous for tonkotsu ramen. Hakata style ramen has a rich white pork bone base and hard noodles. Make your own smooth and flavorful bowl of Hakata ramen! Try it with: soft boiled egg, sesame seeds, pickled ginger DIRECTIONS: 1. Boil 4

items.name: Itsukian Tempura Soba
items.merchantDescription: There's a saying in Japan that long noodles are good luck for a long life! These soba (buckwheat) noodles are extra long for that reason! They also come with tasty crispy tempura balls, seaweed, and crunchy shrimp. Try it with: green onions, mushrooms, and fis

items.name: Crab Power Miso Soup
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy traditional miso soup this summer with an added twist of yummy crab! It's the perfect item to add to any meal or even as a quick lunch as it can be made in just a few minutes. Try it with: tofu, sliced green onions DIRECTIONS: 1. Add the seasoning miso a

items.name: Oden Seasoning
items.merchantDescription: Oden is a beloved comfort food in Japan. It's a warm soy sauce and dashi soup that cooks with a variety of ingredients. Choose your favorite add-ins and make your own special oden! Try it with: hard boiled eggs, daikon, tofu, konjac, fish cake DIRECTIONS: 1. P

items.name: Chinese Miso Soba
items.merchantDescription: Chinese Miso Soba from Japan! This bowl was made for miso lovers. It's flavored with rich and aromatic miso and combined soba noodles, corn, and cabbage. Enjoy this when you're craving a hearty meal. Try it with: fried tofu, sliced carrots, and mushrooms DIREC

items.name: Mocchi-Zuu Shiba Plush
items.merchantDescription: It wouldn't be a puppy party without a precious puppy plush to cuddle! The shiba is a national icon in Japan that is often associated with loyalty and steadfast companionship. Keep this perfectly huggable dog close and they are sure to be your best friend.

items.name: Pochacco Purse
items.merchantDescription: The sporty pup Pochacco is faithfully here to help you keep your everyday necessities at hand and in style. Adjustable straps and clips make it easy to use in the way you like best! Fit the strap to your body or unclip it to double as a wallet.

items.name: Dog Sticky Notes
items.merchantDescription: These doggies will help you remember your to-dos! Stick them on your notes, fridge, or puppy's treats (to remind you to give them one for being extra good)

items.name: Shiba Stickers
items.merchantDescription: You can never have too many shibas! Decorate your laptop, planner, scrapbook, and more with these playful pups. They are sure to cheer you up every time you see them.

items.name: Sunaoshi Spicy Ramen
items.merchantDescription: Can you handle these noodles? This ramen is as spicy as its red broth boasts. The soy sauce and hot pepper soup base is paired with accents of green onions, leek, and chili peppers. Try it with: White rice and cheese (add these to the remaining soup after fini

items.name: Kit Kat: Setouchi Salty Lemon (Mini)
items.merchantDescription: Japanese Kit Kats are famous for being so unique and different. Here is a Kit Kat made to taste like lemons from the Setouchi region. Please Note: If temperatures in your location are above 28°C (82°F), this chocolate product may get heat damaged in transit. W

items.name: Kit Kat Japan Sweet Potato

items.merchantDescription: Hi-Chews are a staple chewy candy from Japan. Here we have a strawberry flavor that helps mark Hello Kitty's anniversary.

items.name: Gyukaku: Gyukarubi Yakisoba
items.merchantDescription: Gyukaku is one of Japan's prime yakiniku restaurants. You can experience the flavors of grilled meat with this unique yakisoba.

items.name: Cells At Work! Kesshoban Nendoroid Figure
items.merchantDescription: This is the cute Kesshoban figure from the anime 'Cells At Work!' .

items.name: One Piece Boa Hancock Mouse Pad
items.merchantDescription: This is the mouse pad featuring Boa Hancock from the anime 'One Piece'. This features an elevated area which can help relax your wrist as you use your mouse.

items.name: Hatsune Miku Wallet
items.merchantDescription: Hatsune Miku is a very famous character in Japan and even around the globe. This is a wallet featuring Hatsune Miku.

items.name: Love Live! Cleaner Cloth
items.merchantDescription: This is a cleaner cloth featuring the famous anime and game, 'Love Live!'. You can clean your phone and glasses using this cleaner cloth.

items.name: Cute Anime Girls Group Photo Iphone X Case
items.merchantDescription: This is an iPhone case that can accompany you when you are lonely.

items.name: Dreamy Anime Girl Iphone X Case
items.merchantDescription: This is an iPhone X case that can accompany you when you are lonely.

items.name: Canned Horse Meat (Whale Flavor)
items.merchantDescription: This is a canned horse meat with a whale flavor, which is a unique food in Japan. Can is approximately 270g.

items.name: Pokemon Transforming Ditto: Poipole Plushie
items.merchantDescription: Ditto does it again! Here he transforms into this Poipole plushie! Size: appro 16.5cm x 12cm x 12cm

items.name: Tamagogani Crab Snack
items.merchantDescription: Do you like crabs? Well, here's a snack for you! You can enjoy crunchy dried crabs in this savory snack, and it actually goes well with alcoholic drinks like beer.

items.name: Ottotto: Usushio Flavor
items.merchantDescription: Ottotto is a popular cracker shaped like fish and other sea creatures! This variety is usushio flavor, or lightly salted.

items.name: Luxury Canned Crab
items.merchantDescription: Japan is famous for its seafood, so feel free to dive into a bit of luxury with this canned crab!

items.name: Remote Control Crab
items.merchantDescription: It looks like the real thing! Surprise your friends with this realistic looking remote control crab. Requires 3 AA batteries (not included)

items.name: Pretz: Osatsu
items.merchantDescription: Pretz is a popular biscuit snack from the makers of Pocky. Here we have a limited edtion sweet potato version.

items.name: Nissin Cup Noodles: Tom Yum Seafood Potato Chips
items.merchantDescription: The famous Nissin Cup Noodles is now in Potato Chips! A must try for exotic flavor fan or for Thai's cuisine lovers!

items.name: Tohato Caramel Corn: Candied Sweet Potato
items.merchantDescription: Caramel corn is renowned for its airy and crispy puffed corn plus, infused with the delicious taste of daigaku imo, or candied sweet potatoes, creating a unique treat!

items.name: Pie No Mi: Cream Brulee
items.merchantDescription: Pie no Mi is one of the favorites of every ages in Japan. Feauturing rich flavor of cream brulee in a flaky and crispy bites!

items.name: Angel Pie: Sweet Potato
items.merchantDescription: Angel Pie has been loved by many customers for its exquisite combination of marshmallows, biscuits and chocolate. Now with their limited edition Sweet Potato flavor so you can eat it happily and fill your stomach. Comes with 8 pieces.

items.name: Hi-Chew: Yellow Peach
items.merchantDescription: Hi-chew is a famous candy for its puree. This limited edition flavor expresses the rich sweetness of yellow peach!

items.name: Kajuu Gummy: Pear
items.merchantDescription: From the famous Meiji brand, this gummy is rich of pear flavor and fragrance.

items.name: Hi-Chew Premium: Lemon Lime
items.merchantDescription: Hi-Chew is here with its Premium series, which features a more 'mochi mochi' texture and more fruit flavor. Here is their lemon and lime flavor.

items.name: Hi-Chew Premium: Yogurt
items.merchantDescription: Hi-Chew is here with its Premium series, which features a more 'mochi mochi' texture and more flavor. Here is their unique yogurt flavor.

items.name: Kajuu Gummy: Lemon Peel
items.merchantDescription: From the famous Meiji brand, this gummy is rich of lemon flavor and fragrance.

items.name: Yamanashi Pione Gummy
items.merchantDescription: This gummy used a high-quality red grape called 'Pione' from Yamanashi Prefecture and has a good balance between sweetness and sourness that completes the elegant flavor.

items.name: Yamagata Cherry Gummy
items.merchantDescription: This gummy used a high-quality cherries from Yamanashi Prefecture and has a good balance between sweetness and sourness that completes the elegant flavor.

items.name: Fanta: Golden Grape
items.merchantDescription: Fanta has been famous for its various flavors. This newest flavor, Golden Grape will change your taste buds!

items.name: Suntory Ume Salty Water
items.merchantDescription: Suntory water is famous for its flavored water. This plum extract and sea salt infused water is perfect for any season and best taken straight out from the fridge!

items.name: Pikachu Kitchen: Enjoy Cooking Blind Box
items.merchantDescription: There's nothing more cute than a Pokemon collectibles! Here you can get 1 of a possible 8 different Pokemon kitchen and food-inspired toys.

items.name: Sours Gummy: Hokkaido Melon
items.merchantDescription: It is the tart 'suppai' (sour) powder coating that sets these gummy candies apart from their competition. Here we have a flavor inspired by the melons of Hokkaido.

items.name: Ufo Yakisoba Gomoku Ankake Style
items.merchantDescription: Nissin never fail to introduce a very tasteful noodles. This medium thin noodles with the flavor of seafood and the taste of vegetables is tangled and delicious!

items.name: Cup Noodle Rich Suppon Soup Flavor
items.merchantDescription: Popular instant ramen maker Nissin is here with its latest creation - a flavor made to taste like suppon, or softshell turtle.
